description_long: This is a tall, freestanding banner display featuring a vertical pole mounted on a sturdy, multi-tiered square base. The pole is topped with a pointed finial and supports a horizontal crossbar from which a large, rectangular fabric banner is suspended. The banner itself is visually striking, covered in a vibrant, multicolored grid pattern that fades from green and red at the top to blue and black at the bottom, with a central white gradient. The fabric is split into two pointed tails at the bottom, adding a decorative touch. The base and pole are also decorated with a similar color grid, giving the entire structure a cohesive, eye-catching appearance. This type of banner is typically used for public events, festivals, or as a decorative urban marker.
description: A tall, freestanding banner with a colorful grid-patterned fabric suspended from a pole on a square base. The design is vibrant and decorative, suitable for public or event spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full colorful banner with its split tails and the detailed grid pattern, as well as the decorative base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the banner and the supporting pole, with the banner itself barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the back of the banner and the base, with the same vibrant grid pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pole and base, with the banner not visible from this angle.
